positive: Stylized, symmetrical celestial flora pattern. A central cluster of highly detailed, luminous abstract flowers and crystalline vines that appear to grow from deep space. The design should feature strong contrast between deep indigo and midnight blue nebulas, with accents of brilliant gold leaf, shimmering silver dust, and bioluminescent emerald green accents. Composition must be highly detailed, centralized, and suitable for seamless, repeating textile printing. Flat vector graphic quality mixed with hyper-detailed etching style. Use dramatic, ethereal backlighting, clean silhouettes, and intricate linework. Minimalism combined with maximalist detail. Studio photography quality, high resolution, perfect composition.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photorealistic, ugly
